text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I win a ticket to an Umamusume<n>martial arts
show during a shopping<n>trip.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Hoping to learn a thing or two, I go to<n>watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I'm leaving. I'd be better off lifting<n>weights
myself than watching this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why make assumptions when<n>the match
hasn't even begun?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So much for "performing an<n>observation-based
analysis of athletic<n>aptitude concerning muscular
fitness."<n>The heck is all this?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I only care about running. I'm not<n>watching some
primitive fistfight.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanted to sit around sipping<n>juice,
enjoying shows—you<n>should've brought a
friend.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I think both races and fights share a<n>commonality
in the sense they both<n>require physical
movement.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah, please.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... hey! Everyone here is crowding<n>me in—I
can't leave like this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But of course! It's a really popular<n>match. Rather
than worrying about the<n>turnout, turn your gaze to
this<n>Umamusume fighter. What a body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have some hypotheses as to how<n>she
developed those muscles, but I<n>wonder how she
will use them... This<n>is so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, are you listening to me?! Tch, I<n>guess I have
no other choice...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, the match begins.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The show of power and speed at<n>hand scales far
beyond human limits.<n>The crowd is stirred into a
frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What did you think, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Their physical coordination was<n>next-level.
Whatever they're doing to<n>train, it's better than
any method I<n>know.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Makes me wonder how they'd do in<n>a race.
They wouldn't beat me,<n>obviously, but I bet
they'd put up a<n>decent challenge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see, I see! And?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess... regardless of your path, all<n>athletes are
fighting an uphill battle<n>with their physical limits,
trying to<n>climb the mountain to the top.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trying to reach the top of one's own<n>mountain,
eh? Now that's poetic! Tell<n>me what else you've
learned.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. I've already said too much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm outta here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And where do you think you're<n>going? I'm sure
there are a few more<n>poems inside you. Please,
I'd love to<n>hear more!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Would you just shut up foronce?!
